generated_oml:
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring motor input current (I_M)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIKController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller providing motor current, position derivatives, and torque calculations"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TorqueDataTransmitted, AngularVelocityDataTransmitted, AccelerationDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance PositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryPositionEncoder
]

instance TorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SiemensSINUMERIKController
]

instance AngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SiemensSINUMERIKController
]

instance AccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SiemensSINUMERIKController
]

instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling of the robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for friction model simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionControlIntegrationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for asset management"
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetManagementService
]

instance MQTTDataStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance SINUMERIKControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller for motion control"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionControlIntegrationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom dashboard for visualization of friction models and sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw input current data (I_M) from motor sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance PositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from secondary position encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated torque (τ) from Siemens SINUMERIK controller"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity (ω) derived from position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Acceleration derived from position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AccelerationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SysMLBDDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance AASModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for MABI MAX 100 robot first axis asset management"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Structural modeling using SysML for robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelInsight
]

instance AssetManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Asset management using Asset Administration Shells"
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetManagementInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization of friction models and sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides SensorDataInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelInsight
]

instance MotionControlIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integration of friction models to improve robot motion control accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustControlAlgorithmAction, ParameterUpdateAction
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmissionInsight
]

instance StructuralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural model of MABI MAX 100 robot first axis for system understanding"
]

instance AssetManagementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Asset management information for MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
]

instance SensorDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data visualization for monitoring"
]

instance FrictionModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model insights used to adjust control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance DataTransmissionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data transmission status and reliability monitoring"
]

instance AdjustControlAlgorithmAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting control algorithms based on friction model insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Updating robot control parameters based on deviation between simulated and measured data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot for machining tasks"
    base:contains MotorCurrentSensor, SecondaryPositionEncoder, SiemensSINUMERIKController, SysMLBDDModel, SysMLIBDModel, CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel, AASModel, DashboardVisualizationEnabler, SimulinkSimulationEnabler, SINUMERIKControllerEnabler, AASEnabler, MQTTDataStreamingEnabler, StructuralModelingService, AssetManagementService, DashboardVisualizationService, FrictionIdentificationService, MotionControlIntegrationService, DataStreamingService
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing for continuous friction model identification during robot operation"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical robot components (motor, gearboxes, encoders), SysML structural models, Simulink behavioral models, AAS for asset context, MQTT data streams, processing components for model execution, and unified dashboard visualization"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase ('as operated'), focusing on real-time data during robot operation"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data versus measured reference data; multi-physics-aware friction model identification using both white-box and black-box approaches to ensure accuracy"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data transmission from physical sensors to the digital shadow"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) following Industrie 4.0 standards and SysML for system modeling"
]
